title: Large Fire in Glasgow Forces Closure of Major Train Station
summary_full: The blaze that started near Scotland’s busiest station was under control, but officials said they expected train service to be disrupted through Monday.
summary_public: The blaze that started near Scotland’s busiest station was under control, but officials said they expected train service to be disrupted through Monday.
